lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs to be roadworthy.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches, dents, or blemishes. The interior is in pristine condition, showing no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and have been maintained to factory specifications.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, dents, or chips, and has been kept in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the upholstery is pristine, showing no signs of wear, and all electronic features and driver aids function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is exceptional, with a complete service history documenting meticulous maintenance performed exclusively at the dealership. This is a collector-quality example that requires absolutely nothing but a new owner who appreciates a vehicle in perfect state.

Step into automotive perfection with this absolute gem! This car is in truly pristine, mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it rolled off the lot. Meticulously cared for and flawless in every detail, it represents the very best of its kind. If you’re looking for a showroom-quality vehicle that stands out from the rest, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age. The engine starts consistently and runs well, but the transmission shifts a bit roughly at times and the suspension would benefit from a future tune-up. Cosmically, there are several noticeable scratches on the exterior panels and the interior upholstery shows significant wear, particularly on the driver's side. It is a functional and honest car that is ready for the road but would appreciate some cosmetic and minor mechanical attention from its next owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. It demonstrates consistent mechanical reliability and a sophisticated aesthetic, reflecting a history of diligent care and responsible ownership. Engineered for performance and longevity, this model offers an exceptional balance of luxury and utility, ensuring a superior driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for quality and excellence.

Hi there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s clean and runs smoothly. Come take it for a spin—you’ll definitely fall in love with it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein dampers. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within factory tolerances. While the exterior shows minor stone chips consistent with spirited use, the mechanical integrity is superlative, featuring the factory M-Variable limited-slip differential for optimal corner-exit traction. A visceral, analog machine ready for the apex.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Well-maintained interior.

This vehicle has been thoughtfully maintained and presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only the minor, expected road wear that comes with careful use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with the premium upholstery and all electronic features—including the dual-zone climate control and navigation—functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is robust; it starts eagerly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and has a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. It offers a tight, responsive driving experience that inspires confidence. While not a showroom trailer queen, it is a reliable, high-quality example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure a superior driving experience, balancing robust performance with a refined interior. It represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber vehicle that maintains its functional excellence and professional appeal.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, characterized by its robust mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience. It stands as a testament to durability and engineering excellence, representing a premier choice for the discerning motorist seeking both value and reliability. This vehicle has undergone a rigorous inspection to confirm it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and comfort.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a brand-new adventure! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes. It runs like a dream and has been well-loved, so you can just hop in and go. Come take it for a spin—I’m sure you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-strung S54 inline-six powerplant, utilizing individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS to achieve a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and delivered to the tarmac through a variable M-differential lock. The chassis is structurally sound, benefiting from proactive subframe reinforcement and a recent suspension refresh with poly-bushes. Maintenance is up to date, including a documented valve clearance adjustment and rod bearing replacement. While the exterior displays minor road-going patina consistent with a well-loved enthusiast car, the mechanical integrity is robust, offering the visceral, analog feedback these M-cars are celebrated for.
Reliable daily driver. Solid mechanical condition. Clean title. Minor exterior scratches. Well-maintained interior.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated blend of performance and luxury that truly stands out. The exterior retains a deep, brilliant shine, with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic blemishes that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin serves as a clean and comfortable sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery has been regularly conditioned to prevent wear, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, boasting a documented history of consistent oil changes and preventative service. The engine delivers smooth, responsive power, while the transmission shifts seamlessly. With ample tread remaining on the tires and firm, confident braking, this car is ready for the road immediately. It has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains a reliable and high-quality choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical integrity, this unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for safety and roadworthiness. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automotive experience.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. A premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for all my trips. I’ve taken great care of it, and it still looks and feels fantastic on the road. It’s ready for its next adventure with a new owner—could that be you? Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This 2005 Porsche 911 Carrera (997.1) features the M96 3.6L flat-six engine, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. Mechanically sound, it benefits from a proactive IMS bearing retrofit and a recently replaced rear main seal. The chassis retains its composure with Bilstein dampers and a multi-link rear suspension setup that provides exceptional lateral grip. The braking system utilizes four-piston monoblock calipers over ventilated, cross-drilled rotors for consistent thermal management. While the finish shows minor stone chips and the interior exhibits light bolster wear, the drivetrain remains robust with strong compression across all cylinders and a smooth clutch take-up. An ideal driver’s spec for those prioritizing mechanical integrity and analog feedback.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This exceptionally well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road-wear consistent with careful driving. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment with premium upholstery that remains supple and supportive. Mechanically, the car is in top form; the engine pulls smoothly through every gear, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. All scheduled maintenance has been strictly followed, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires. It’s a turn-key example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity. It remains in commendable condition, offering a seamless blend of luxury and proven performance. Each component has been evaluated to meet our professional standards, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated ownership experience. This represents an exceptional acquisition for the informed motorist who values both quality and long-term value.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated design. This selection has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. With a documented history of consistent care, this automobile offers a superior balance of aesthetic appeal and mechanical integrity, making it an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who values quality and longevity.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a gem. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner! It looks great and drives even better—perfect if you're looking for something dependable and fun. I'd love for you to come by, check it out, and take it for a test drive!
Available for acquisition is a mechanically sound 997.1 Carrera, powered by a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six engine featuring VarioCam Plus
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and style, perfectly suited for a driver who values a well-maintained machine. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor character marks and light road wear expected from careful daily use. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free, tidy cabin with supportive seating and upholstery that has held up remarkably well. Mechanically, the car has been consistently serviced, offering a smooth power delivery and responsive handling that inspires confidence on every turn. From the ice-cold air conditioning to the crisp sound system, all interior electronics and safety features function exactly as intended. It is a solid, dependable vehicle that reflects true pride of ownership and is ready to provide its next owner with years of enjoyable miles.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term value. Our rigorous inspection process ensures this selection meets our exacting standards for reliability and presentation. Experience a superior driving standard with this distinguished addition to our inventory.
